data.title: Arch Capital Group opens 2 global centers in Trivandrum and Pune, India; a third in Hyderabad soon. will employ 350+.
data.description: Arch Capital Group Ltd. has revealed the inauguration of two additional global capabilities hubs in Trivandrum and Pune, India, with a third one set to open in Hyderabad soon. These facilities will house over 350 employees and support Arch's Insurance, Reinsurance, and Mortgage Insurance operations. The move aims to leverage the advanced talent pool in India for more efficient servicing of the company's various business sectors.

data.title: American Vanguard reports Q2 2025 results: Net sales up at $129 million vs $128 million in Q2 2024.
data.description: American Vanguard Corporation, a company specializing in agricultural products, revealed their financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. They reported net sales of $129 million compared to $128 million in the same period last year. The company also disclosed an Adjusted EBITDA1 in the second quarter of 2025. American Vanguard Corporation focuses on developing, manufacturing, and marketing solutions for crop protection and nutrition, turf and ornamental management, and commercial pest control.

data.title: Celsius Holdings to release second quarter results on August 7, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida. $CELH #LiveFit.
data.description: Celsius Holdings, Inc., based in Boca Raton, Florida, announced that it will unveil its financial results for the second quarter on Thursday, August 7, 2025, before the market opens. This information will provide insights into the company's performance during the specified period, revealing crucial data to investors and stakeholders. Such transparency allows for a better understanding of the company's financial health and direction, aiding in informed decision-making.

data.title: United Rentals launches new Confined Space Safety Training Program (NYSE: URI), aiming to enhance safety and compliance for contractors and utility personnel.
data.description: United Rentals, Inc., the biggest equipment rental company globally, unveiled its improved Confined Space Safety Training for Competent Persons Program that aims to aid contractor and utility workers in recognizing confined space risks and fostering safer working environments. The updated program, tailored to align with changing job site requirements, offers new content and learning structures. The initiative precedes the company's Confined Space Safety Week and is part of its commitment to providing top-notch training. This move demonstrates United Rentals' dedication to ensuring workplace safety, as part of their efforts to create better work conditions.

data.title: Bright Horizons Family Solutions reported financial results for Q2 2025 with updated guidance. Leader in early education.
data.description: In Newton, Mass., Bright Horizons Family Solutions Inc. (NYSE: BFAM) unveiled its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 and revised financial projections for the year. The company, known for its top-notch early education, child care, family care services, and workforce education offerings catering to working families and client employees, shared key highlights for Q2 2025 in comparison to Q2 2024. Revenue figures and specific numbers were not provided in the rephrased content, but the reported metrics show a positive trend for Bright Horizons.

data.title: Apple's Q3 2025: Revenue $94.0 billion, up 10% YoY, earnings per share $1.57, up 12% YoY, CEO Tim Cook announces record revenue.
data.description: In Cupertino, Calif., Apple revealed its financial performance for the fiscal 2025 third quarter ending on June 28, 2025. The tech giant reported quarterly revenue of $94.0 billion, a 10% increase compared to the previous year, with quarterly diluted earnings per share reaching $1.57, marking a 12% year-over-year growth. Apple's CEO, Tim Cook, expressed pride in achieving a revenue record for the June quarter, highlighting double-digit expansions in iPhone, Mac, and Services. Cook also emphasized global growth across all geographic segments.
South Korea and US Foreign Ministers "Reaffirm Firm Commitment to DPRK's Complete Denuclearization"
Company announces $10B Q2 profit, to raise $4.2B for Bitcoin acquisitions.

data.title: authID will report Q2 results on Aug 14, 2025 (Nasdaq: AUID). Webcast at 5pm ET. CEO & CFO to discuss financials.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, authID® (Nasdaq: AUID), a prominent company specializing in biometric identity verification and authentication solutions, disclosed its plan to release financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The report is scheduled for Thursday, August 14, 2025, post the market's closure. Subsequently, at 5:00 p.m. ET, a webcast hosted by authID's CEO, Rhon Daguro, and CFO, Ed Sellitto, will delve into the financial outcomes and deliver a corporate overview.
Trump signs Executive Order on Sports Council, fitness test

data.title: SNDL reports successful resolutions at 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. Good news for holders of common shares.
data.description: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ: SNDL) (CSE: SNDL) announced on July 31, 2025, that resolutions were passed at the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders held in Edmonton, AB. Shareholders voted in favor of the resolutions presented by the Company. SNDL expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the Meeting, where important decisions were made regarding the common shares.

data.title: MicroStrategy beats Q2 earnings with revenue of $114.49 million, up 2.7% YoY, and reports Bitcoin yield at 19.7%.
data.description: MicroStrategy Inc, trading as Strategy, released their Q2 financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported revenue of $114.49 million, exceeding the estimated $112.96 million. Adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were $32.52. Year-over-year, total revenue increased by 2.7%. Revenue by segment includes: Subscription Services at $40.8 million, up by 69.5%; Product Licenses and Subscription Services at $48 million, up by 43.9%; and Product Support at $52.1 million. For further details, the complete article is available for access on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mike T. Fitzgerald named CFO of BWX Technologies with NYSE: BWXT stock, interim CFO since May 12, joined in 2022. CEO impressed by his work.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) based in Lynchburg, Virginia, has appointed Mike T. Fitzgerald as the Chief Financial Officer. Fitzgerald, who had been serving as the interim CFO since May 12, has been praised for his exceptional performance in the role. Rex Geveden, the President and CEO of BWXT, commended Fitzgerald for his strategic acumen and comprehensive grasp of the company's operations. Fitzgerald initially joined BWXT in 2022 as the Vice President of Finance and Chief Officer, and his transition to CFO signifies the company's confidence in his abilities.

data.title: Excelerate Energy increases quarterly dividend to $0.08 per Class A common stock, 33% higher than prior quarter.
data.description: Excelerate Energy, Inc. revealed today that a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of Class A common stock has been declared by its Board of Directors for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. This represents a notable 33% surge from the previous quarter. The dividend will be distributed on September 4, 2025, to Class A common stockholders listed as of August 20, 2025. Excelerate is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EE.

data.title: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) announces $0.31/share quarterly dividend, payable on Sept 17, 2025, to shareholders on record as of Sept 3.
data.description: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) based in Charlotte, N.C., announced a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on September 17, 2025, to shareholders on record as of September 3, 2025.

data.title: Nuvve to give financial update for Q2 2025 on Aug 14, 2025. Conference call at 5:00 PM ET. $NVVE.
data.description: Nuvve Holding Corp. ("Nuvve") announced that it will release its second-quarter financial update for the period ending June 30, 2025, on Thursday, August 14, 2025. The company, known for its expertise in grid modernization and vehicle-to-grid technology, will conduct a conference call at 5:00 PM Eastern Time (2:00 PM PT) on the same day to discuss the financial results and other business updates. Participants interested in joining the call can do so to gain insights into Nuvve’s performance and strategic developments in the second quarter of 2025. This information was shared by Nuvve Holding Corp., listed as NVVE on the Nasdaq, a significant player in the industry.

data.title: A’s partner with Aramark for new Las Vegas ballpark hospitality, adding acclaimed restaurateur Will Guidara.
data.description: In Las Vegas, the Athletics have revealed a lasting agreement for food and beverage services at their upcoming stadium in collaboration with Aramark Sports + Entertainment. Aramark (NYSE: ARMK) enlisted renowned restaurateur and author of the New York Times bestseller "Unreasonable Hospitality," Will Guidara, to assist in shaping the venue's culinary and hospitality experience. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing the fan experience, elevating the standards for ballpark dining.

data.title: Authenticom wins 2025 Gold Stevie Award for Management Team of the Year in Information Technology-Cloud Services.
data.description: In New York on July 31, 2025, Authenticom, a top provider of secure data integration and hygiene solutions for the automotive sector, received the prestigious Gold Stevie Award for Management Team of the Year in Information Technology-Cloud Services. This recognition highlights the company's excellence in this field and the dedication of its team.
